name: Instagram Trend Post Builder
description: A weekly Instagram workflow in three moves: scout what's trending in your niche, learn why it's working, then build an original post around what you actually want to say. Research → teach → create, as a connected flywheel.

skills.role: Research — finds winning formats, hooks, and hashtag patterns for a niche via web search (no API required).
Teach — explains in plain language why each trend is working (algorithm, psychology, format) and surfaces opportunity angles.
Build — interactively produces a copy-paste post package: 3 hooks, caption, CTA, 15-20 hashtags, alt text, visual direction.
